author: Joshua Martinez
name: SP1024 + Depth Recurrence (L3-5) + Parallel Residuals + Legal Score-First TTT (1.0745 BPB)
blurb: SP1024 tokenizer with 3-layer depth recurrence (11→14 virtual layers), parallel residuals from layer 7+, and legal score-first TTT (3 epochs, lr=0.005, chunk-based adaptation per PR #461/#549 pattern). No pre-quant TTT — fully SAFE_SUBMISSION lane compliant. Beats our previous BORDERLINE submission (PR #1489 at 1.07389 BPB) by 0.0006 BPB with clean legality.
run_notes: Legal score-first TTT (PR #461/#549 pattern) — chunk-based adaptation without pre-quant training. Result: 1.0745 BPB (quantized_sliding_etlb). Beats our best BORDERLINE (1.07389 BPB) with clean SAFE_SUBMISSION legality. Architecture: SP1024 + 3-layer depth recurrence + parallel residuals. TTT: 3 epochs, lr=0.005, freeze_blocks=0.
